zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Tremayne於1342年出生在英國英格蘭可瓦爾時，他的父親Richard Tremayne28歲，母親Mary Erney22歲。他和Isabella Trenchard至少有13個兒子和1個女兒。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Tremayne于1342年出生在英国英格兰可瓦爾时，他的父亲Richard Tremayne28岁，母亲Mary Erney22岁。他和Isabella Trenchard至少有13个儿子和1个女儿。

nameMeanings.name: Tremayne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Tremaine
meanings: Cornish: habitational name from one or more places in Cornwall named Tremayne (Saint Columb Major, Crowan, Saint Martin in Meneage), Tremaine, or Tremain (Pelynt). The placenames all derive from Middle Cornish tre ‘estate, farmstead’ + men ‘stone’, with the exception of Tremaine, which may have menegh, plural of manach ‘monk’, as the final element.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Tremayne was born in 1342, in Cornwall, England, United Kingdom, his father, Richard Tremayne, was 28 and his mother, Mary Erney, was 22. He had at least 13 sons and 1 daughter with Isabella Trenchard.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Tremayne est né en 1342, à Cornouailles, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Richard Tremayne, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Mary Erney, avait 22 ans. Il a eu au moins 13 fils et 1 fille avec Isabella Trenchard.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Tremayne 1342 in Cornwall, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Richard Tremayne 28 und seine Mutter Mary Erney 22. Er hatte mit Isabella Trenchard mindestens 13 Söhne und 1 Tochter.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Tremayne è nato il nel 1342 nel Cornwall, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Richard Tremayne, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Mary Erney, aveva 22 anni. Lui avuto almeno 13 figli e 1 figlia con Isabella Trenchard.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Tremayneが1342年にイギリスイギリスコルンワルで生まれた時，父Richard Tremayneは28歳，母Mary Erneyは22歳であった。彼はIsabella Trenchardとの間に少なくとも13人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Tremayne(이)가 1342년 영국 잉글랜드 코른월에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard Tremayne(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Mary Erney(은)는 22세였다. 그는 Isabella Trenchard(와)과 적어도 열 명 이상의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Tremayne nasceu em 1342, em Cornwall, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Richard Tremayne, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Mary Erney, tinha 22 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 13 filhos e 1 filha com Isabella Trenchard.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Tremayne родился в 1342 г. в местности корнвалл, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Richard Tremayne было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Mary Erney, 22. У него было по крайней мере 13 сыновей и 1 дочь от Isabella Trenchard.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas Tremayne nació en 1342, en Cornwall, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Richard Tremayne, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Mary Erney, tenía 22 años. Tuvo por lo menos 13 hijos y 1 hija con Isabella Trenchard.
